nodes.name: Cargo.toml
nodes.summary: Cargo manifest for the risingwave_planner_test crate, declaring dependencies on the frontend crate and test framework for SQL planner unit tests.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Documentation for the RisingWave planner test framework, covering test case format examples for SELECT and EXPLAIN queries, how to update expected outputs, and how to run individual tests.

nodes.name: planner_test.toml
nodes.summary: RiseDev task configuration defining the do-apply-planner-test (dapt) and run-planner-test tasks for regenerating and running planner test expected outputs.
